title: Integrated intelligent acoustic system
abstract: The present invention provides an integrated intelligent acoustic system which includes a control unit, an input unit, an acoustic unit and a display unit. The control unit of the present invention can be embedded with various software programs to realize different music playing functions, so as to satisfy different demands of the users. The control unit realizes intelligent management and usage to music files.
